description_en: Canada Summer Jobs provides wage subsidies to employers who create summer job placements for young people aged 15–30. Small businesses with under 50 employees are eligible.
description_fr: Emplois d'été Canada fournit des subventions salariales aux employeurs qui créent des emplois d'été pour les jeunes de 15 à 30 ans.

funding_details.eligible_wage_en: Up to the provincial/territorial minimum wage, or the actual wage paid, whichever is lower
funding_details.note_en: Employers must pay at least minimum wage. Subsidy covers 50% of minimum wage for private sector.

eligibility.residency: Canadian citizen, permanent resident, or person with refugee protection

application.window_en: Applications typically open in October–November for the following summer
application.note_en: Competitive process — applications are scored on community impact and alignment with CSJ priorities
